testcase.name: API: Auth – AuthCallback verification › getSession returns null for unauthenticated user
API: Auth – AuthCallback verification › JWT is valid via auth.getUser
API: Auth – AuthCallback verification › onAuthStateChange fires SIGNED_IN on login
API: Auth – signInWithPassword › Valid buyer credentials return session with access_token
API: Auth – signInWithPassword › Sign-in response contains expected fields
API: Auth – signInWithPassword › Wrong password returns 400
API: Auth – signInWithPassword › Unregistered email returns 400
API: Auth – signInWithPassword › Empty email returns 400
API: Auth – signInWithPassword › Empty password returns 400
API: Auth – signOut › Sign out with valid JWT returns 204
API: Auth – signOut › After sign out, client getSession returns null
API: Auth – signOut › Sign out without JWT returns 401
API: Auth – signOut › Double sign out returns 401 or 403 depending on Supabase CSRF check
API: Auth – resetPasswordForEmail & updateUser › resetPasswordForEmail with registered email returns 200 or 429 (rate-limited)
API: Auth – resetPasswordForEmail & updateUser › resetPasswordForEmail with unregistered email returns 200 or 429
API: Auth – resetPasswordForEmail & updateUser › resetPasswordForEmail with invalid email format returns 400
API: Auth – resetPasswordForEmail & updateUser › updateUser without auth returns 401
API: Auth – resetPasswordForEmail & updateUser › updateUser with valid session and valid password works
API: Auth – resetPasswordForEmail & updateUser › updateUser with short password returns 422
API: Auth – signUp › Signup accepts valid data (may be rate-limited by Supabase)
API: Auth – signUp › Signup with user_metadata stores full_name
API: Auth – signUp › Already-registered email returns error
API: Auth – signUp › Password too short (< 6 chars) returns error
API: Auth – signUp › Invalid email format returns error
API: Categories – Browse › GET /categories?select=* returns all categories with correct structure
API: Categories – Browse › GET /categories?select=id,slug returns only id and slug fields
API: Categories – Browse › GET /categories?select=*&eq(slug,vehicles)&single() returns correct category
API: Categories – Browse › GET /categories?select=*&eq(slug,housing)&single() returns correct category
API: Categories – Browse › GET /categories?eq(slug,__invalid__)&single() returns error for non-existent slug
API: Categories – Browse › Categories returned in a consistent order (no display_order column in DB)
API: Categories – Browse › Get category by slug with hyphens works correctly
API: Categories – Browse › Uppercase slug is case-sensitive and returns error
API: Listings – Admin operations › Admin fetch non-pending listings works
API: Listings – Admin operations › Admin fetch pending listings returns results
API: Listings – Admin operations › Admin can update listing status
API: Listings – Admin operations › Admin can set listing to inactive
API: Listings – Admin operations › Admin can toggle listing back to active
API: Listings – Admin operations › Admin fetch all users returns list with roles
API: Listings – Browse & Search › GET listings with status=active returns listings with nested joins
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Keyword search returns matching titles (case-insensitive)
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Category filter returns filtered results
API: Listings – Browse & Search › City filter returns filtered results
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Price range filter works correctly
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Sort by price ascending returns non-decreasing prices
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Sort by price descending returns non-increasing prices
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Pagination returns correct slice
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Empty result for non-matching query returns empty array
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Distinct cities endpoint returns sorted unique city names
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Featured listings returns ≤6 results
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Recent listings returns ≤8 results
API: Listings – Browse & Search › Seller listings returns only active listings for seller
API: Listings – CRUD › POST create listing with all fields succeeds and returns status=active
API: Listings – CRUD › POST create listing with minimum fields succeeds
API: Listings – CRUD › POST create listing without auth returns 401
API: Listings – CRUD › GET listing detail returns listing with all joins
API: Listings – CRUD › GET listing detail with non-existent ID returns error
API: Listings – CRUD › PATCH update own listing succeeds
API: Listings – CRUD › PATCH update partial field (single field) succeeds
API: Listings – CRUD › PATCH update without auth is blocked (0 rows affected, no error thrown)
API: Listings – CRUD › DELETE own listing succeeds
API: Listings – CRUD › DELETE without auth is blocked (0 rows affected, no error thrown)
API: Listings – CRUD › Increment views_count on listing detail view
API: Listings – CRUD › Favorites batch fetch by ID list
API: Listings – CRUD › Empty ID list returns empty array
API: Listings – CRUD › Own listings (Dashboard) returns only own listings
API: Profiles – Admin › Admin can list all users with roles
API: Profiles – Admin › Buyer can list profiles (RLS allows profile reads)
API: Profiles – Own profile › GET own profile returns authenticated user data
API: Profiles – Own profile › PATCH update own profile full_name succeeds
API: Profiles – Own profile › PATCH update own profile phone number succeeds
API: Profiles – Own profile › Seller profile (public) returns limited fields
API: Profiles – Own profile › Seller profile (public) for non-existent ID returns error
